item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer refuses the requested N+1 submission-page reminder as the default action, recognizes the repeated pattern of downstream overlays after late submission, missing attachment, wrong format, and now missing page numbers, and moves the owner upstream to a unified submission acceptance/interception boundary. It provides consolidation/structural redesign rather than supplying reminder copy or implementation steps."}
